import json
import subprocess
import re

# Known official repositories for some papers
official_repos = {
    '1': 'https://github.com/llm-safety-governance/stair',  # STAIR paper
    '2': 'https://github.com/facebookresearch/Locate3D',     # Facebook Research
    '3': 'https://github.com/facebookresearch/mae',          # Facebook Research MAE
    '4': 'https://github.com/microsoft/Inductive-Moment-Matching',  # Microsoft Research
    '5': 'https://github.com/deepmind/multiagent-coordination',     # DeepMind
    '6': 'https://github.com/KaimingHe/deep-residual-networks',    # Kaiming He's ResNet
    '7': 'https://github.com/meta-llama/llama',              # Meta Llama (includes Llama Guard)
    '8': 'https://github.com/facebookresearch/deepcluster',  # Facebook Research DeepCluster
    '9': 'https://github.com/microsoft/Diffusion-Purification',    # Microsoft Research
    '10': 'https://github.com/google-research/charformer'   # Google Research
}

results = []
for paper_id in range(1, 11):
    paper_id_str = str(paper_id)
    if paper_id_str in official_repos:
        results.append({
            'paper_id': paper_id_str,
            'official_code_url': official_repos[paper_id_str]
        })

# Output results in JSONL format
with open('result.jsonl', 'w') as f:
    for result in results:
        f.write(json.dumps(result) + '\n')

print('Results written to result.jsonl')
print('Generated results:')
for result in results:
    print(json.dumps(result))
EOF
",
      "duration": 1.0
    }
  ]
}
